leadText: Glitzy Glow (Japanese: どばどばオーラ Gushing Aura) is a damage-dealing Psychic-type move introduced during Generation VII, in Pokémon: Let's Go, Pikachu! and Let's Go, Eevee!. It is one of the signature moves of the partner Eevee.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generation VII [ edit | edit source ] Glitzy Glow deals damage and sets up the effects of the move Light Screen on the user's side of the field. Generation VIII onwards [ edit | edit source ] Glitzy Glow cannot be selected in a battle. However, it has been modified: its power was changed to 80 and its accuracy to 95%.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description P E The user bombards the target with telekinetic force. A wondrous wall of light is put up to weaken the power of the opposing Pokémon's special moves. Sw Sh BD SP LA S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.
